meta.summary: P2Rank 2.5.1 protein ligand-binding site prediction runtime with prank and bundled fpocket helper for fpocket-rescore.
meta.description: P2Rank 2.5.1 protein ligand-binding site prediction runtime with prank and bundled fpocket helper for fpocket-rescore.

test: prank -v 2>&1 | grep -F "P2Rank 2.5.1" >/dev/null && { prank help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "predict pockets" >/dev/null && { prank help 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F "eval-rescore" >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v fpocket)" 2>&1 | grep -F "not found" && exit 1 || true

tmp=/tmp/taf-p2rank-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; grep -v '^HETATM' /opt/p2rank/test_data/1fbl.pdb > "$tmp/1fbl_nohet.pdb"; prank predict -visualizations 0 -threads 1 -o "$tmp/predict" -f "$tmp/1fbl_nohet.pdb" > "$tmp/predict.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/predict/1fbl_nohet.pdb_predictions.csv"; test -s "$tmp/predict/1fbl_nohet.pdb_residues.csv"; grep -F "pocket1" "$tmp/predict/1fbl_nohet.pdb_predictions.csv" >/dev/null; if grep -F "Could not download" "$tmp/predict.log"; then exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-p2rank-fpocket-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; grep -v '^HETATM' /opt/p2rank/test_data/1fbl.pdb > "$tmp/1fbl_nohet.pdb"; printf "HEADER: protein\n1fbl_nohet.pdb\n" > "$tmp/mini.ds"; prank fpocket-rescore "$tmp/mini.ds" -visualizations 0 -threads 1 -o "$tmp/fpocket_rescore" > "$tmp/fpocket-rescore.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/fpocket_rescore/1fbl_nohet.pdb_rescored.csv"; test -s "$tmp/fpocket_rescore/1fbl_nohet.pdb_predictions.csv"; if grep -F "Could not download" "$tmp/fpocket-rescore.log"; then exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: P2Rank
upstream.citation: Krivak R, Hoksza D. P2Rank: machine learning based tool for rapid and accurate prediction of ligand binding sites from protein structure. Journal of Cheminformatics. 2018;10:39.
